name: Infernoid Piaty
name_jp: インフェルノイド・アシュメダイ
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand or GY) by banishing 2 "Infernoid" monsters from your hand or GY while the total Levels and Ranks of all Effect Monsters you control are 8 or lower. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by attacking an opponent's monster: You can send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 monster, then target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish it.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand or GY) by banishing 2 "Infernoid" monsters from your hand or GY while the total Levels and Ranks of all Effect Monsters you control are 8 or lower. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by attacking an opponent's monster: You can send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 monster, then target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish it.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand or GY) by banishing 2 "Infernoid" monsters from your hand or GY while the total Levels and Ranks of all Effect Monsters you control are 8 or lower. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by attacking an opponent's monster: You can send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 monster, then target 1 card in your opponent's GY; banish it.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
